description: Oracle Analytics Desktop is open on the Windows desktop. Using the order data in 'sample_order_lines2023.xlsx' located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\OracleAnalyticsData\sample_order_lines2023.xlsx, create a workbook named 'margin_analysis'. The workbook must include a calculated column named 'Profit_Margin' using the formula (Profit / Sales * 100) to represent the profit margin as a percentage. Generate a Table visualization that displays 'Product Category', 'Sales' (Sum), 'Profit' (Sum), and the average of the 'Profit_Margin' column. Save the completed workbook as 'margin_analysis'.
